element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player starts with basic rapid-fire; upgrades via blue box power-ups throughout all levels
Periodically descend from top of screen; increase bullet count and speed with each collection
Eight distinct weapons available from start; collected via numbered power-ups; range from directional bullets to shields to indestructible projectiles
Basic enemies; difficulty scales via ALC system based on player skill
Primary collision hazards throughout all levels
Stationary threats; appear in fortress boss encounters
Require sustained fire or specialty weapons to destroy
Destroying these reduces ALC difficulty; incentivizes specific tactical choices
More resistant to weaponry; bullets repelled; change color as damaged; appear throughout all levels with increasing frequency
One or more per stage; all turrets must be destroyed within time limit for bonus points; primary level-ending encounters

typical_relief_triggers: Destroying fortress boss within time limit
typical_tension_triggers: Failing to destroy fortress within time limit (increases ALC)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced with adaptive difficulty scaling; tension continuously builds via ALC system that responds to player aggression and skill; fortress encounters serve as climactic tension peaks followed by relief at level transition

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Pressing A+B at game over or credits screen reveals hidden message ('SEE YOU AGAIN IN GUARDIC')

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate initial challenge; ALC starts low for inexperienced players; basic enemy types and simple fortress patterns introduced
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating difficulty via ALC adaptive scaling; mini-bosses increase in frequency and resistance; fortress complexity grows; player skill directly determines enemy density
difficulty_curve.late_game: Peak difficulty if player has performed well (high ALC); Areas 10-12 feature densest enemy patterns, most aggressive mini-bosses, and complex fortress designs; time-pressure on boss destruction intensifies
notable_spikes: First fortress encounter (Area 1) - player learning curve

notable_level_patterns.description: Vertical scrolling through planet/space station/outer space environments; continuous enemy waves; culminates in fortress boss with turret destruction objective and time bonus incentive
Stationary multi-turret structure; all turrets must be destroyed within specified time limit to earn bonus points; represents primary difficulty and point-scoring peak of each level
Large enemy ships scattered throughout levels; highly resistant to fire; change color as health depletes; repel player bullets; more frequent in later levels as ALC escalates
Enemy density and difficulty dynamically adjust based on: shooting frequency, power-up collection, boss time-limit success, life loss, level start, and reconnaissance plane destruction
